description: A production pod named 'order-processor' in the 'sales-prod' namespace is experiencing silent failures and has dumped a diagnostic trace to '/app/diagnostics/trace.json' inside its 'main-app' container. The pod runs a 'distroless' image (lacking a shell and core utilities), and you must extract the data without deleting, recreating, or copying the pod to ensure the Pod UID remains unchanged. Extract the value of the 'fault_signature' key from the trace.json file and create a Kubernetes Secret named 'fault-signature-hotfix' in the 'sales-prod' namespace with a key named 'signature' containing the exact extracted fault signature string. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!

metadata.occupation: Site Reliability Engineer / Cloud Security Engineer
